allow: Bash(echo "=== Gemini commit time ===" git log --oneline --format="%ai %s" "C:/Work/InfinitriX")

Bash(IMAGE_PROVIDER="" GEMINI_API_KEY="test-key" OPENAI_API_KEY="" npx tsx -e "import\('./src/image/index.js'\).then\(m => { const p = m.getImageProvider\(\); console.log\('provider:', p?.name, 'model:', p?.modelTag, 'nativeAlpha:', p?.supportsNativeTransparency\) }\)")

Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY="test" GEMINI_API_KEY="test" IMAGE_PROVIDER=openai npx tsx -e "import\('./src/image/index.js'\).then\(m => { const p = m.getImageProvider\(\); console.log\('selected:', p?.name, 'nativeAlpha:', p?.supportsNativeTransparency\) }\)")
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY="" GEMINI_API_KEY="" IMAGE_PROVIDER="" npx tsx -e "import\('./src/image/index.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('available:', m.isImageGenerationAvailable\(\)\)\)")
